title: Notifications  - Update successful
scenario: Firmware update completion notification redirects to Software update complete screen when Poly Lens app is in background
steps: 1. Launch the Poly Lens app on the Android device.
2. Navigate to the Home screen and ensure a Poly Bluetooth audio device is connected.
3. Initiate a firmware update for the connected device via the app.
4. While the firmware update is in progress, press the Home button or switch to another app to send the Poly Lens app to the background.
5. Wait for the firmware update to complete successfully.
6. Observe the Android notification shade for a notification stating "Device is updated".
expected: A "Device is updated" notification appears in the Android notification shade. Tapping the notification redirects the user to the Software update complete screen within the Poly Lens app.
